c.d: Ability of the app to sync and operate seamlessly across multiple devices and operating systems.
Includes tagging, folder hierarchy, and search capabilities to organize and retrieve notes easily.
Capability to convert handwritten notes into editable digital text using stylus input.
Features enabling sharing, real-time editing, and teamwork on notes or documents.
Cost structure including free usage, freemium, or one-time/payment subscription.
How clean, distraction-free, and easy to use the app interface is for note-taking.
Support for multimedia notes such as images, sketches, tables, markdown, and PDF annotation.
